_comment: Copy this file to ~/.relay/permission-rules.json to opt in. Real JSON has no comment syntax, so this _comment key documents the shape instead — it is ignored by the loader (only the `rules` array is read). No file at ~/.relay/permission-rules.json means the pretool-hook NEVER intercepts, even when AFK is on.

_fields.tool: Exact Claude Code tool name (Bash, Write, Edit, ...).
_fields.inputMatch: Optional regex tested against JSON.stringify(tool_input). Always matched case-insensitively. Omit it to match every call of that tool.
